title: melica ciliata
intro: Melica ciliata, also known as the hairy melic grass, is a species of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Melica ciliata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
